heading: Competitive awards program
label: 278k–1 Competitive awards program
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to this section were contained in , prior to the general amendment of section 278k by .section 278k(f) of this titlePub. L. 114–329
amendments: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to this section were contained in , prior to the general amendment of section 278k by .section 278k(f) of this titlePub. L. 114–329

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: The Director shall establish within the Hollings Manufacturing Extension Partnership under and section 278 of this title a program of competitive awards among participants described in subsection (b) of this section for the purposes described in subsection (c).section 278k of this titlel

children.heading: Participants
children.label: b Participants
children.text: Participants receiving awards under this section shall be Centers, or a consortium of Centers.

children.heading: Purpose
children.label: 1 Purpose
children.text: The purpose of the program established under subsection (a) is to add capabilities to the Hollings Manufacturing Extension Partnership, including the development of projects to solve new or emerging manufacturing problems as determined by the Director, in consultation with the Director of the Hollings Manufacturing Extension Partnership, the MEP Advisory Board, other Federal agencies, and small and medium-sized manufacturers.

children.heading: Themes
children.label: 2 Themes
children.text: The Director may identify 1 or more themes for a competition carried out under this section, which may vary from year to year, as the Director considers appropriate after assessing the needs of United States manufacturers and the success of previous competitions.

children.heading: Reimbursement
children.label: 3 Reimbursement
children.text: Centers may be reimbursed for costs incurred by the Centers under this section.

children.heading: Applications
children.label: d Applications
children.text: Applications for awards under this section shall be submitted in such manner, at such time, and containing such information as the Director shall require in consultation with the MEP Advisory Board.

children.heading: Peer review and competitively awarded
children.label: 1 Peer review and competitively awarded
children.text: The Director shall ensure that awards under this section are peer reviewed and competitively awarded.

children.heading: Geographic diversity
children.label: 2 Geographic diversity
children.text: The Director shall endeavor to have broad geographic diversity among selected proposals.

children.label: A
children.text: Improve the competitiveness of industries in the region in which the Center or Centers are located.

children.label: B
children.text: Create jobs or train newly hired employees.

children.label: C
children.text: Promote the transfer and commercialization of research and technology from institutions of higher education, national laboratories or other federally funded research programs, and nonprofit research institutes.

children.label: D
children.text: Recruit a diverse manufacturing workforce, including through outreach to underrepresented populations, including individuals identified in section 1885a or .section 1885b of title 42

children.label: E
children.text: Such other result as the Director determines will advance the objective set forth in or in section 278 of this title.section 278k(c) of this titlel

children.heading: Program Contribution
children.label: f Program Contribution
children.text: Recipients of awards under this section shall not be required to provide a matching contribution.

children.heading: Global marketplace projects
children.label: g Global marketplace projects
children.text: In making an award under this section, the Director, in consultation with the MEP Advisory Board and the Secretary, may take into consideration whether an application has significant potential for enhancing the competitiveness of small and medium-sized United States manufacturers in the global marketplace.

children.heading: Duration
children.label: h Duration
children.text: The duration of an award under this section shall be for not more than 3 years.

children.heading: Definitions
children.label: i Definitions
children.text: The terms used in this section have the meanings given the terms in .section 278k of this title
